hero.title: Convert files faster with premium simplicity.
hero.subtitle: Converigo brings secure, responsive, and polished file conversion for students, creators, and office professionals.

upload.label: Upload Your File
upload.subtext: Drag, drop or browse to select your file.

popular.heading: Most requested conversion flows
popular.description: Quick access to the formats people need most.

features.heading: Everything you need to convert files effortlessly
features.description: Reliable performance and polished details for daily use.

fast.title: Fast Processing
fast.text: Optimized workflows keep conversions quick and smooth.

secure.title: Secure Transfers
secure.text: File handling is designed with privacy and trust in mind.

wide.title: Wide Format Support
wide.text: Video, audio, and document conversions are all available.

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.text: Built to look great on desktop, tablet, and mobile screens.

items.question: What file formats can I convert?
items.answer: Converigo supports popular video, audio, and document formats including MP4, MP3, WAV, PDF, DOCX, and more.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: All uploaded files are handled securely and the UI is designed to respect privacy during conversion tests.

items.question: Will it work on mobile devices?
items.answer: Yes. The landing page is fully responsive and built for desktop, tablet, and mobile users.

footer.description: Modern file conversion for students, creators, and professionals.
footer.copyright: © {year} Converigo. Built for elegant file conversion.

panel.label: Ready to convert
panel.title: Upload one file and get your converted result.

step1.title: Upload your file
step1.text: Select a supported file and send it to Converigo.

step2.title: Choose output
step2.text: Pick the output type and review your settings.

step3.title: Download instantly
step3.text: Receive your converted file without installing software.
